class.name: SpineSlot
class.description: Stores a slot's current pose. Slots organize attachments for skeleton draw order purposes and provide a place to store state for an attachment. State cannot be stored in an attachment itself because attachments are stateless and may be shared across multiple skeletons.

method.name: get_data
method.description: Returns the slot's setup pose data.

method.name: get_bone
method.description: Returns the bone this slot belongs to.

method.name: get_pose
method.description: Returns the current pose for this slot, containing color, attachment, and deform data.

method.name: get_color
method.description: Returns the color used to tint the slot's attachment. If dark color is set, this is used as the light color for two color tinting.

method.name: set_color
method.description: Sets the color used to tint the slot's attachment. If dark color is set, this is used as the light color for two color tinting.

method.name: get_dark_color
method.description: Returns the dark color used to tint the slot's attachment for two color tinting, or null if two color tinting is not used. The dark color's alpha is not used.

method.name: set_dark_color
method.description: Sets the dark color used to tint the slot's attachment for two color tinting. The dark color's alpha is not used.

method.name: has_dark_color
method.description: Returns whether the slot has a dark color for two color tinting.

method.name: set_has_dark_color
method.description: Sets whether the slot has a dark color for two color tinting.

method.name: get_attachment
method.description: Returns the current attachment for the slot, or null if the slot has no attachment.

method.name: set_attachment
method.description: Sets the slot's attachment and, if the attachment changed, resets sequence_index and clears the deform. The deform is not cleared if the old attachment has the same timeline attachment as the specified attachment.

method.name: get_sequence_index
method.description: Returns the index of the texture region to display when the slot's attachment has a Sequence. -1 represents the setup index.

method.name: set_sequence_index
method.description: Sets the index of the texture region to display when the slot's attachment has a Sequence. -1 represents the setup index.

method.name: get_attachment_state
method.description: Returns the attachment state for this slot.

method.name: set_attachment_state
method.description: Sets the attachment state for this slot.

method.name: get_deform
method.description:
Returns values to deform the slot's attachment. For an unweighted mesh, the entries are local positions for each vertex. For a weighted mesh, the entries are an offset for each vertex which will be added to the mesh's local vertex positions.
See VertexAttachment.computeWorldVertices and DeformTimeline.

method.name: set_deform
method.description: Sets values to deform the slot's attachment. For an unweighted mesh, the entries are local positions for each vertex. For a weighted mesh, the entries are an offset for each vertex which will be added to the mesh's local vertex positions.

method.name: set_to_setup_pose
method.description: Sets this slot to the setup pose.
